forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your e-mail to receive the recovery code
forgotPassword.emailSentMessage: Check your inbox (and spam). The code has 8 characters and expires in 5 minutes.
forgotPassword.resendError: Unable to resend the code right now.
forgotPassword.resendSuccess: A new code has been requested. Check your e-mail.
forgotPassword.newPasswordSubtitle: Create a strong password for your account
forgotPassword.passwordRule: ✓ Minimum 8 characters: uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol (@ # $ % ^ & + =)
forgotPassword.passwordChangedMessage: You can now log in with your new password.
